title: Denied a speaker, pro-Palestinian Democrats make new demand on Harris
shortDescription: After a sit-in, the uncommitted Democratic delegates are demanding Harris visit them in Michigan and elsewhere by Sept. 15.

title: Mary Trump lends debate advice to Kamala Harris
shortDescription: Niece and critic of Donald Trump, Mary Trump, spoke about Kamala Harris' debate strategy against Trump during an interview at the DNC convention.

title: Exonerated Central Park 5 rip Trump
shortDescription: Members of the exonerated Central Park 5 took the stage on the final night of the Democratic National Convention.
